items.title: OpenAI changes deal with US military after backlash
items.dek: Chief Executive Sam Altman said the group would prohibit the use of its systems to spy on Americans.
items.body: Chief Executive Sam Altman said the group would prohibit the use of its systems to spy on Americans.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: India's top court angry after junior judge cites fake AI-generated orders
items.dek: In several recent instances, AI has disrupted court proceedings in India and elsewhere.
items.body: In several recent instances, AI has disrupted court proceedings in India and elsewhere.

items.title: US sanctions Rwanda's military and top commanders over fighting in DR Congo
items.dek: Rwanda accused Washington's move as “one sided” and politically motivated.
items.body: Rwanda accused Washington's move as “one sided” and politically motivated.
